scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,metro -c blue,magenta "pnpm -C server dev" "pnpm -C app start"
scripts.dev:tunnel: concurrently -n api,metro -c blue,magenta "pnpm -C server dev" "pnpm -C app start:tunnel"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm -C server typecheck && pnpm -C agent typecheck && pnpm -C app typecheck
